description: Enforces database access boundaries - prevents bun:sqlite and drizzle-orm imports outside the core/db package boundary.
rationale: Database access should be encapsulated behind DbClient and DAO interfaces.
Direct use of bun:sqlite or drizzle-orm outside the DB layer couples application code to SQLite implementation details.
Schema re-exports leak internal implementation across package boundaries.
notes: This policy replaces the check-db-boundaries.ts script.
Only packages/core/src/db/* and packages/core/tests/db/* are allowed to import database primitives.

rules.message: bun:sqlite imports must be in packages/core/src/db/** or packages/core/tests/db/**
drizzle-orm imports must be in packages/core/src/db/** or packages/core/tests/db/**
Schema re-exports must remain inside the DB boundary
